creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: We can't do much with this bug. boot0sio just calls the BIOS to get a character. If it's doing weird things, there's nothing we can do. It doesn't look for any control lines or anything. So if there's a bug here, it's in the Soekris bios. Soekris has stopped operations, which is another reason I'm closing this bug: I can't reproduce it in a VM nor with the more standard PC environments I've been using for the past decade in exactly this configuration...
